description: JCS-canonicalized metadata exceeds 65536 bytes. Registry MUST reject with schema_violation (HTTP 400). The cap applies to the JCS canonical form (the bytes that feed content_hash), not the raw wire bytes.

input.metadata_under_test_summary: A metadata object whose JCS canonical form is > 65536 bytes. Concrete payload omitted; one workable construction is { 'k0' .. 'k99': '<a 700-byte ASCII string>' } which canonicalizes to ~70KB.
